---
title: 'Is the "Bible is Sufficient" a valid phrase?'
date: '2025-02-16T03:28:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'Class Discussion Posts'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><i>Names removed for anonymity, but this is worth sharing!&nbsp;</i></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">To those who say, "The Bible is Sufficient" and therefore shun (1) academic study of the Bible using other non-biblical texts, (2) modern psychology, (3) modern science, (4) and are just generally anti-intellectual or pseudo intellectual... My classmate asks:</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">"I guess those leaders would happily undergo surgery by a doctor who used the all-sufficient Bible as their only textbook in medical school? And I guess their mother's favorite apple pie recipe was found somewhere in Leviticus?"</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">Worth asking one of these "Bible is Sufficient" types if you run into them.</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEi4q6y8Wv8zs4MzwqfLcaY-N8MvJBf9KFde2wW0omWJgDwxQjg1DhItiLcDkXxGi0b0C8TcwfVGvyY5DwOs0BNbkXer8xA1wggq4SkogjMYEAHa3hSktc71IQiQfLJFxfh47TSu_zZcYqZZK_yJdCKfEr5yzzI7mMEkxzz-T9EDo7hmKq_SUdk9rt6tIWBP" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="" data-original-height="748" data-original-width="1337" height="358" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEi4q6y8Wv8zs4MzwqfLcaY-N8MvJBf9KFde2wW0omWJgDwxQjg1DhItiLcDkXxGi0b0C8TcwfVGvyY5DwOs0BNbkXer8xA1wggq4SkogjMYEAHa3hSktc71IQiQfLJFxfh47TSu_zZcYqZZK_yJdCKfEr5yzzI7mMEkxzz-T9EDo7hmKq_SUdk9rt6tIWBP=w640-h358" width="640" /></a></div><br /><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><br /><br /><br />

<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Shalom&nbsp;<span face="sans-serif" style="background-color: white; color: #202122; font-size: 14px;">שָׁלוֹם</span>: Live Long and Prosper!</span>
<br />

<div class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">Darrell Wolfe</span>
</div>

Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant | Freelancer | Bible Nerd
<i>*Written withs some editing and research assistance from ChatGPT-4o</i>
<br /><br /><br />
